title: Notifications -  Update Available OFF
scenario: No device software update notification appears when notification setting is OFF and app is in background after pairing a device with outdated firmware
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Locate the 'Device Software Update' notification toggle and set it to OFF.
4. Close the app to background (do not force close).
5. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device with firmware lower than the current version on the server is powered off.
6. Pair the device with the mobile device via Bluetooth.
7. Observe the mobile device for any notification related to a device software update.
expected: No 'Device Software Update' notification appears on the mobile device after pairing.
